General.Name: CBK Holdings Ltd
General.Description: CBK Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides catering services in Hong Kong. It operates through Restaurants Operation and Sales and Processing of Food segments. The company engages in the food processing business. It is also involved in management consultancy services; and license of restaurant operation. CBK Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Kowloon City, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Bupa Centre, Hong Kong, Hong Kong
